problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: If Quantum annealing for optimization problems is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
